description: Phases 11-15 Autonomous Run — Garmin/Strava OAuth verify, Habits/Bloodwork verify, Meals v5 dashboard + FAB implementation, Play Store submission prep. All phases executed sequentially by priority.

userStories.technicalNotes: The settings_screen.dart already has working Connect/Disconnect buttons. health_connection_screen.dart is the secondary screen that still hides them. Use the same provider pattern as settings_screen.dart.

userStories.technicalNotes: Deep link handler is in app.dart _handleOAuthDeepLink(). Check AndroidManifest.xml has intent filter for welltrack:// scheme. Do not hardcode credentials.

userStories.technicalNotes: Strava uses standard OAuth 2.0. STRAVA_CLIENT_ID passed via --dart-define at build time.

userStories.title: Verify disconnect flow for both providers

userStories.technicalNotes: Garmin revocation is best-effort. Strava calls deauthorize endpoint. Both set is_connected=false and clear tokens.

userStories.title: Verify webhook ingestion pipeline (Garmin + Strava)

flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: Webhook handler must respond 200 within 30 seconds. Never process inline. All processing done by process-webhooks batch function.

userStories.title: Create todayNutritionProvider and todayRecoveryScoreProvider
acceptanceCriteria: Read PRPs/meals-v5-implementation-plan.md section 3.1 first

Create lib/features/meals/presentation/today_nutrition_provider.dart
todayMacroSummaryProvider(profileId) returns consumed and goal for protein, carbs, fat

todayCalorieSummaryProvider(profileId) composes base from nutritionTargetsProvider, applies PlanType->dayType mapping (push->strength, normal->cardio, easy/rest->rest), applies calorieAdjustmentPercent and calorieModifier for PRO users
todayMicronutrientSummaryProvider(profileId) returns fat, sodium, cholesterol, carbs, sugar, fiber (null for untracked)
todayNutritionDashboardProvider(profileId) combines all three into single async state
Create lib/features/insights/presentation/today_recovery_score_provider.dart
todayRecoveryScoreProvider(profileId) reads from insightsProvider latestRecoveryScore
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: PrescriptionEngine is static. Daily prescription via DailyPrescriptionRepository.getTodayPrescription(profileId). currentPlanTierProvider for freemium check. Free users get static MacroCalculator target.
